videos.title: Agentic AI Revolution: Building Autonomous Intelligent Systems for Real-World Impact
From Helsinki to the World: Finland's AI-Native Government Transformation
OS-Level Automation and Agentic Systems: Building the Future of Computer Use
videos.description: Explores cutting edge of agentic computing: OS-level automation, browser-based agents, distributed swarm systems.

videos.title: Building Agentic Systems at Scale: Architecture, Security, and Real-World Implementation
videos.description: Explores cutting-edge landscape of agentic AI systems, focusing on practical implementation strategies and security considerations. Covers multi-bot platforms, architectural decision records, and defense against prompt injection.

videos.title: Agentix Foundation: Building a Global Community for Agentic AI Development
videos.description: Introduces the Agentix Foundation, global non-profit for advancing agentic AI. Three strategic pillars: education, community building, driving measurable impact. Showcases CloudFlow V3 and demonstrates how AI agents accelerate development from concept to deployment in hours.

videos.title: London Meetup - AI Powered Content Creation: From Sheet Music to Semantic Graphs
videos.description: Showcases leveraging LLMs for practical development workflows: sheet music-to-audio converter (WebAssembly), CRM via Ruflo, automated content library with Notebook LM. Covers multi-agent orchestration, semantic graphs from unstructured data, containerization, and collaborative AI-driven development.

videos.title: Building Agentic Systems: Network Topologies, Skills Aggregation, and AI Infrastructure
videos.description: Cutting edge agentic AI systems: network topology optimization for agent coordination, skills aggregation, quality engineering, prime radiant coherence engine, hardware optimization for AI infrastructure.
videos.transcript_preview: Discussion starting with weather check-in, congratulations to Bill McGraw and David Gratton for Vancouver kickoff event. Covers network topologies, skills aggregation, autonomous coding, hardware optimization.

videos.title: Building the Prime Radiant: A Coherence Engine for AI Anti-Hallucination
videos.description: Introduces the Prime Radiant, a coherence engine solving AI hallucinations and unverifiable confidence scores. Uses mathematical integrity and recursive language models for verification.

videos.title: Building Agentic AI Solutions: Ruflo, Anti-Gravity, and Real-World Applications
videos.description: Practical implementations of agentic AI technologies: Ruflo and Anti-Gravity platforms. London-based agentic AI projects showcased.

videos.title: CloudFlow V3 and Agentic Systems: Building the Future of AI Development
videos.description: Latest developments in CloudFlow V3 and agentic AI systems. Multiple real-world applications from industry professionals. Architectural decisions for production systems.

videos.title: Ruflo v3 Release: Revolutionary Agentic AI System with 500K+ Downloads
videos.description: Comprehensive discussion on Ruflo v3 with 500K+ downloads and 12K GitHub stars. Covers incrementally learning AI system that adapts in real-time: swarm coordination, drift detection, intelligent token optimization. Hierarchical mesh for agent coordination, memory and embedding systems via WASM, security features (real-time PII detection, jailbreak monitoring). Differs from traditional AI by operating as prosthetic to human intelligence. Covers Seven Cents bioacoustic project, deployment strategies, 27 hooks system, background workers.
chapters: Ruflo v3 Release and Overview - 438K downloads, incremental learning, hierarchical mesh coordination
Guest Introductions and Community Updates - meetups in Vancouver, Bangalore, Toronto, Halifax

Ruflo v3 Architecture - agents/workers with vector/graph implementations, Agent Booster token optimization, model routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), micro-LoRa learning, defense system (0.04ms threat detection)
Seven Cents Bioacoustic Project - animal communication translation via bioacoustic embeddings, mincut algorithm
System Architecture Deep Dive - Root Vector system, WASM compilation, Agent DB, comparison vs Crew AI/LangGraph/Autogen
Security, Deployment, Hooks System - 27 hooks, trajectory learning, PII stripping, background workers
Windows Compatibility and Visualization - hyperbolic vector spaces, prime number quantization, time crystals
Emily OS Orchestration Platform - agent swarm management, LLM agnostic, scales 2-100K agents
AI Symbolic Protocol - mathematical language reducing ambiguity from 40% to <2%, 512 symbols, Lean4 integration
Beacon Disaster Rescue - Wi-Fi mesh network, life detection through rubble, quantum-resistant algorithms, $5-20 devices
Community Branding - retro-futuristic 1984 aesthetics, Atari/Sega inspired
Community Engagement - CB Radio submissions, marketing, meetup planning worldwide
Advanced Topics - bias management, dynamic min-cut, hallucination prevention via mathematical determinism
Integration Strategies - CLI vs MCPs, MCP grouping, local models, deployment packages, ADRs

videos.title: Building the Future: AI-Powered Media Discovery and Smart TV Integration at the Global AI Hackathon
videos.description: Inaugural Global AI Hackathon: 80 registered participants, 29 active forks. Cinesphere geolocation-based content discovery. Root Vector: intelligent database replacing PG Vector with attention mechanisms. Samsung Smart TV integration. Hyperbolic embeddings, graph neural networks, federated learning. EU regulation compliance for emotional manipulation and data sovereignty.

key_features: V2 to V3 migration preserving memory

architecture.math: Prime numbers, odd numbers (7 optimal for quantization)

claude_flow_v3.vs_competitors: Crew AI, LangGraph, Autogen lack: learning, pattern recognition, expert routing, attention mechanisms, QLoRA, vector memory, swarms
claude_flow_v3.agent_limits: 15 agent limit in Claude Code, workaround via sub-agent invocation, headless instances, Rue LLM for local free processing, 3-tier agent architecture
claude_flow_v3.skills_system: Skills as learned abilities (bounded contexts) vs agents as executors. Transferable between Claude desktop/code/web via zip files. Progressive discovery pattern. 14,000+ vetted skills from GitHub.
